prompt:
[Figure] Image 1 [Signature] In the lower right corner, there is a small Threads logo operated by Meta, and above it, "CHAse" is written in small white cursive like a signature.

[Figure Pose and Expression]
A medium shot pose in a vintage interior, with the body slightly turned to the right and head facing the camera. The right hand carefully holds a lit vintage brass candlestick, while the left hand lightly grasps the soft fabric of the dress. With the head slightly bowed and eyes gazing longingly at the bottom right of the frame, a sad and dreamy emotion like a character in a classic painting is deeply felt.

[Clothing]
Wearing an antique cream-white off-shoulder dress that softly reveals the shoulders and collarbone. Delicate embroidery and ruffle lace details adorn the neckline and chest, while sleeves are airy, voluminous see-through Poet style with lace cuffs for an elegant cottagecore look.

[Hair and Makeup]
A classic updo hairstyle with natural wisps and curls. Strands flow along the cheeks and neck, topped with a lush hydrangea-style flower crown in soft blue, cream, and vintage purple. Makeup features porcelain skin, deep pink blush, and nude pink lip makeup for a classic doll-like look.

[Lighting and Direction]
Dramatic lighting combining candlelight and a strong studio backlight. Golden candlelight warms the jawline and lips, while strong backlighting creates a dazzling rim light on hair and shoulders, penetrating atmospheric mist.

[Texture and Color Mood]
A color mood reminiscent of Renaissance oil paintings, dominated by faded sepia brown and antique ivory. Soft blue and purple from the crown act as sensory points. Combines rustling silk textures, heavy brass metal textures, and soft film grain for a romantic, poetic vibe.

[Film and Camera Depth, Angle]
Shot with an 85mm telephoto lens at f/1.8, 1/160s, ISO 400. Captured at eye-level to focus on emotional lines and antique details. Shallow depth of field keeps the subject sharp while the background is creamily out-of-focus.

[Background (Optional)]
A minimal matte grayish-brown vintage studio background with subtle smoke or mist, maximizing lighting contrast. The typography "BLANC" is sensibly matched in a thin, neat white sans-serif font at the bottom center.
